summary: Created src/search.ts with webSearch() function and src/search.test.ts with 12 tests. Implementation uses ddgGet from client.ts to call DuckDuckGo d.js endpoint, parses raw response fields (t/u/a/s) into SearchResult interface, filters invalid URLs, limits by maxResults (default 10). Error handling: empty/null response returns [], DdgApiError propagates. 12/12 tests pass, typecheck clean. Live verification blocked by sandbox network restriction (Node.js undici timeout to DuckDuckGo — known limitation).
